name: mpp-skill
description: Machine Payments Protocol (MPP) skill for ClaudeHub/OpenClaw agents — pay-as-you-go Mobula API calls via Tempo
author: Florent Tapponnier

wallet.purpose: Hold ~$1 of USDC.e on Tempo (chainId 4217) for pay-as-you-go MPP API calls (~$0.0004/call). Private keys are AES-256-GCM encrypted at rest.
wallet.spendingPolicy: Each call consumes the amount specified in the server's 402 challenge. The skill rejects challenges >$0.01 to prevent runaway charges.
